homeSection.title: Home Section
homeSection.subTitle: Backend Engineer | .NET Core | Scalable Systems | System Design
para: I design and build secure, high-performance backend systems using .NET Core, with a strong focus on authentication, authorization, and scalable architecture.
Specialized in JWT-based authentication, RBAC, caching strategies, and building production-ready APIs.

aboutMe.title: About Me
aboutMe.content:
Backend Engineer with 5+ years of experience designing and building scalable, secure backend systems using .NET Core and TypeScript. I specialize in developing production-grade APIs, implementing robust authentication and authorization systems using JWT and refresh tokens, and designing role-based access control (RBAC) systems.

My focus is on writing clean, maintainable code and building architectures that scale. I have hands-on experience in applying caching strategies, rate limiting, and asynchronous processing to improve performance and reliability.

Currently, I am building a personal finance platform with a microservice-ready architecture, focusing on modular backend design, goal-based investment tracking, and data-driven insights.

I enjoy solving complex backend challenges and designing systems that are secure, scalable, and production-ready.

content.title: Personal Finance Portfolio Management System
content.subTitle: Scalable goal-based investment and asset tracking platform
content.description:
Designed and developing a full-stack personal finance platform to track assets, liabilities, and financial goals with a focus on long-term wealth planning.

Built with a microservice-ready backend architecture, the system supports goal-based investment planning, real-time data processing, and modular service design.

Implemented secure authentication using JWT with refresh tokens, role-based access control (RBAC), and scalable API design. Focused on performance optimization using caching and efficient data handling.

content.title: CAD Model Simulation Plugin
content.subTitle: High-performance engineering simulation tool
content.description:
Developed a CAD plugin for simulating engineering models to assist in analysis and decision-making.

Focused on performance optimization and handling complex geometric data. Designed efficient data processing workflows and integrated simulation logic within the CAD environment.

Improved usability and performance for engineers working with large-scale models.

content.title: CAD Data Management Plugin
content.subTitle: Structured data management for engineering models
content.description:
Built a plugin to manage and organize CAD model data efficiently.

Implemented structured data handling using MVC architecture and improved data accessibility for engineering workflows. Focused on maintainability and modular design for long-term scalability.

content.title: Earth Resource Estimation Application
content.subTitle: Geospatial-based resource calculation system
content.description:
Developed a desktop application to estimate earth resource quantities using geospatial data.

Worked on data processing, calculation logic, and system performance. Focused on accuracy, efficiency, and handling large datasets.
